pages.title: The Beginning
pages.text: The path to cosmic power begins with the fundamental force of the universe: $(alien)Entropy$(). This is the energy released when living things decay.$()$(br)$()To begin, you must capture the life force of mobs and accelerate their decay artificially.

pages.title: Pocket Dimensional Prison
pages.text: This item can capture any living entity (except players and armor stands). Right-click on a mob to trap it. The entity is stored with all its NBT data.

pages.title: Decay Chamber Controller
pages.text: The brain of the Decay Chamber. Without this, nothing happens.

pages.title: Decay Chamber Blocks
pages.text: Build a 2-block high pillar of these above the controller to complete the multiblock structure.

pages.title: How Decay Works
pages.text: Place a captured entity in the Decay Chamber. The chamber will slowly extract entropy from the entity over time.$(br)$()Normal mobs: 2000 ticks to fully decay$(br)$()Boss mobs: 12000 ticks (6x longer)$()$(br)$()Output: $(item)Entropy Biomass$() - the foundation of all AlienTech power.
